summary: Decision support for this genome across the antibiotic panel; every result must be confirmed by laboratory testing.

per_antibiotic.narrative: Meropenem is LIKELY TO FAIL. A known resistance mechanism (a carbapenemase) was detected in the assembly.
Ceftriaxone is LIKELY TO WORK. No resistance signal was detected for this agent.

caveats: This is decision support only; confirm every result with laboratory testing.
